name: almi-danish
description: AlmiPortuguese — AI-powered Portuguese exam practice in the AlmiWorld family. European CAPLE (Portugal) and Brazilian Celpe-Bras readiness with honest per-skill estimates and AI feedback, no fabricated composite. Separate product (almiicelandic.almiworld.com). Original content — never copied from official exam material. Practice estimates only; confirm the level you need with the official exam body.

scripts.build: node scripts/seo/countries-axis-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/uniqueness-gate.mjs && prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build
